title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Fortune Hotels - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Fortune Hotels - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, Fortune Hotels in Navi Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Fortune Hotels:
Fortune Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Crisis Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fortune Hotels!
